candidate_check.description: Windows 11 must not have portproxy enabled or in use.

check_content_excerpt:
Check the registry key for existence of proxied ports:
HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\PortProxy\.

If the key contains v4tov4\tcp\ or is populated v4tov4\tcp\, this is a finding.

Run "netsh interface portproxy show all".

If the command displays any results, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Contact the Administrator to run "netsh interface portproxy delete" with elevation. Remove any enabled portproxies that may be configured.
title: Windows 11 must not have portproxy enabled or in use.
